features.title: Features
features.hint: Customize the title, description and image of each feature. Formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, SVG — automatically optimized to WebP.

defaults.title: Multi-source search
defaults.desc: CrossRef, Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex and arXiv simultaneously with relevance scoring.

defaults.title: 7 citation formats
defaults.desc: APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, IEEE, Vancouver and BibTeX generated instantly.

defaults.title: Semantic highlighting
defaults.desc: 5 colors with academic meaning: key citations, evidence, insights, doubts and more.

defaults.title: AI Reading Assistant
defaults.desc: Multi-turn conversation about the paper. Suggested questions, history and Trust Cards.

defaults.title: Full PDF
defaults.desc: Upload the PDF and highlight any section of the full text, not just the abstract.

defaults.title: Flexible export
defaults.desc: Export your notes in Markdown, structured JSON or a table for Notion.

users.title: Registered users
users.hint: Manage the users who have registered: grant or revoke administrator permissions and activate or deactivate accounts. Role changes take effect when the user reloads their session.
users.searchPh: Search by name, username or email…
users.cantChangeOwnRole: You can't change your own role
users.cantDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account

write.title: Write
write.bodyPh: Start writing… Place the cursor where you want to cite and click a paper on the right to insert the citation.
write.emptyLib: Your library is empty. Add papers so you can cite them.
write.confirmClearText: The text and citations will be deleted.
